weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 16 total findings across 13 unique CVEs, with no single vulnerability dominating the landscape, as each of the 10 most frequently seen CVEs, including CVE-2026-48172, CVE-2026-45659, and CVE-2026-26980, was observed only once. The threats were dispersed across multiple security domains, including AI/ML, Cloud/IAM, and OS/Kernel, among others. The most active day was May 26, 2026, indicating a recent surge in security incidents, highlighting the need for continued vigilance and proactive measures to mitigate potential risks.
